steps.title: Evaluate at the y-intercept
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. Substitute into the function:
$$f(0)=-8(5)^0+\frac{1}{k}$$
Since $5^0=1$,
$$f(0)=-8+\frac{1}{k}$$

steps.title: Combine the terms
steps.content: Write $-8$ with denominator $k$: $$-8+\frac{1}{k}=\frac{-8k}{k}+\frac{1}{k}=\frac{1-8k}{k}$$ The answer is B.
